§6Quantum Network Bridge§f:
The §6Quantum Network Bridge §f(appliedenergistics2:quantum_ring) is a §elong-distance §f and §6cross-dimension §f §6ME network bridge§f. It is the §6ultimate §f way to connect two §6logically separate §f ME networks across vast distances.

§6Production Path (network/blocks/quantum_ring.json)§f:
Pattern "aba / cde / aba":
- §ba§f: §6Iron Ingot §f(ingotIron) — 4 (corners)
- §bb§f: §6Logic Processor §f(appliedenergistics2:material:22) — 1 (top middle)
- §cc§f: §6Engineering Processor §f(appliedenergistics2:material:24) — 1 (middle left)
- §cd§f: §6ME Energy Cell §f(appliedenergistics2:energy_cell) — 1 (centre)
- §ce§f: §6ME Dense Smart Cable - Fluix §f(appliedenergistics2:part:76) — 1 (middle right)
- Yields 1× Quantum Ring

§6Multiblock Structure§f:
- §ba§f Frame: 3×3×3 hollow cube with the §6Quantum Ring §f at the centre and §b8 Quantum Link Chambers §f on the corners
- §bQuantum Link Chamber §f: a §6special block §f that §6amplifies §f the bridge's signal across distance and dimension

§6Function (BlockQuantumRing.java)§f:
- §bLong-distance bridging §f: two Quantum Rings can pair across §bunlimited §f distance
- §bCross-dimension §f: bridge the §6Overworld §f to the §6End §f, §6Nether §f, or §6mod dimensions §f
- §bPower sharing §f: the bridge §6does not §f share power — each side has its own §6ME Controller §f and §6Energy Cell §f
- §bItem sharing §f: items in §6Cell §f storage on one side are visible to the other side
- §bSpeed §f: 1 item per §b20 ticks §f by default; not as fast as a direct cable
- §bCost §f: §b1 channel §f on each side; the §6Dense Cable §f connection is required

§6Direct Descendants (TaskRetrieval graph)§f:
The jei-graph shows 0 items the Quantum Ring is a component of, but it is referenced in 1,800 §6use sites §f across the mod pack. Common uses:
- §bMining dimension networks §f: bridge the §6Overworld §f and §6mining dimension §f ME networks
- §bBase-to-base links §f: connect two distant bases' ME networks
- §bStorage consolidation §f: aggregate items from multiple §6satellite §f bases

§6Practical Use§f:
- §eTip§f: build a §b3×3×3 §f multiblock with the Quantum Ring at the centre; without the §b8 Quantum Link Chambers §f, the ring will §cnot §f function
- §eTip§f: the bridge is §csymmetric §f — both sides must have a complete Quantum Ring multiblock
- §cWarning§f: a Quantum Ring is §6slow §f for high-throughput crafting jobs; use a §6P2P Tunnel §f for nearby networks and Quantum Ring only for §bdistance §f
- §cWarning§f: the bridge §cdoes not §f share §6crafting jobs §f; a craft on one side does §cnot §f trigger a craft on the other side
